{{CargoRelic
|name=Leviathan
|class_id=22587
|rank=AAA
|affct=CIV
|birthday=01-31
|source=
|description=On Jan 31, 1651 AD, when Leviathan was first published, it was very popular with readers.<br>Leviathan is actually the name of a mythical giant sea creature, which is a metaphor for absolute monarchy. Hobbes organized the book into four sections: Of Man, Of Commonwealth, Of a Christian Commonwealth, and Of the Kingdom of Darkness. This book has been regarded as the foremost political book since its birth and has had a profound influence on the political structures of later generations.
|fame=48
|art=45
|fth=39
|civ=75
|tech=36
|ss1=Snail DEF +30<br>Quantum Amp Max Cap +3%
|ss2=Snail DEF +40<br>Quantum Amp Max Cap +4%
|ss3=Snail DEF +50<br>Quantum Amp Max Cap +5%
|ss4=Snail DEF +70<br>Quantum Amp Max Cap +7%
|ss5=Snail DEF +90<br>Quantum Amp Max Cap +9%
|ss7=Snail DEF +90<br>Quantum Amp Max Cap +9%<br>Quantum Amp Max Cap +7% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Britland skill II.png|50px]]Place in Britland Museum: In Britland, 2x Orange Card Drops +7.5%
|skill2=[[File:Britland skill II.png|50px]]Place in Britland Museum: This Relic's CIV +10
}}
